name: SurrealDB
description: SurrealDB is an innovative scalable database that combines traditional database capabilities with real-time features and advanced querying.
longDescription: SurrealDB is a scalable, distributed database system that combines the capabilities of a traditional database with real-time features, advanced graph querying, and ACID guarantees. It supports multiple query languages, including its own SurrealQL, and provides built-in support for WebSocket connections, making it ideal for real-time applications. The database can run in various modes - from single node to distributed clusters - and offers features like time-travel queries, geospatial queries, and full-text search.
